name: Cheesy Enchilanda Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat with bell pepper, onion, and garlic; drain excess fat.
2. Add beans, tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, picante sauce, cumin, garlic salt, garlic powder, and onion powder to the meat mixture. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Spoon a small amount of meat mixture into a greased 13x9 inch baking dish.
4. Top with tortillas.
5. Spread half of the remaining meat mixture over the tortillas. Sprinkle with cheese and olives.
6. Repeat step 5, but omit the cheese for this layer.
7. Cover tightly with aluminum foil.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
9. Remove foil and sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
10. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Top with lettuce, chopped fresh tomato, sour cream, and additional picante sauce.
